title: pilosella aurantiaca subsp. porphyranthes
intro: Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. porphyranthes, also known as Sanguisorba officinalis, is a plant species within the rosaceae family, commonly referred to as the bloodwort plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Pilosella aurantiaca subsp. porphyranthes include its ability to support digestive health, reduce bleeding, and soothe wounds, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as hemorrhoids, sore throats, and skin irritations.
